core_mechanism: construction of a linear combination of multiple simultaneous measurement channels engineered to lie in the null space of unwanted signal components, so those components cancel and only a chosen orthogonal component survives (null-steering / null-projection filtering)
brief_reason: The abstract's method rests on the null-response channel, a specific interferometric combination of detector outputs designed to suppress (cancel) contributions from all other polarization modes in order to isolate the single targeted transverse scalar mode.
